description: You use the elements in the universalName folder to list the contents of the Universal Name Registry and to look up services or document types by their universal names.

services.name: pub.universalName:find
description: WmPublic. Returns the fully qualified service name for an explicit universal name.

input_parameters.name: namespaceName
description: Namespace portion of the universal name.

input_parameters.name: localName
description: Local portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: svcName
description: Conditional. Fully qualified name of the service associated with the universal name in namespaceName and localName. If the specified universal name is not in the registry, svcName will be null.

services.name: pub.universalName:findDocumentType
description: WmPublic. Returns the fully qualified document type name for a provided explicit universal name.

input_parameters.name: namespaceName
description: Namespace portion of the universal name.

input_parameters.name: localName
description: Local name portion of the universal name.

output_parameters.name: svcName
description: Conditional. Fully qualified name of the document type associated with the universal name in namespaceName and localName. If the specified universal name is not in the registry, svcName will be null.

services.name: pub.universalName:list
description: WmPublic. Returns a list of services in the current universal-name registry.

output_parameters.name: names
description: Each document in the list contains the following information:

children.name: universalName
description: The universal name associated with the entry. This document contains the following information:

children.name: namespaceName
description: Namespace portion of the universal name.

children.name: localName
description: Local portion of the universal name.

children.name: svcName
description: Fully qualified webMethods service name associated with the entry (for example, gl.post:postEntry).

usage_notes: To return the entire contents of the universal-name registry, use the pub.universalName:listAll service.

services.name: pub.universalName:listAll
description: WmPublic. Returns the contents of the current universal-name registry, including services and document types.

output_parameters.name: names
description: There is one entry for every explicit universal name that has been defined on the server. Implicit universal names are not maintained in the registry.
Each document in the list contains the following information:

children.name: universalName
description: Universal name associated with the entry. This document contains the following information:

children.name: namespaceName
description: Namespace portion of the universal name.

children.name: localName
description: Local portion of the universal name.

children.name: svcName
description: Fully qualified Integration Server service name or document type name associated with the entry (for example, gl.post:postEntry).

usage_notes: To return a list of the services in the universal-name registry only, use the pub.universalName:listservice.
